commits.commitMessage: fix: SSE subscriptions don't reconnect after maxDurationMs (#7094) (#7207)
fix(server): pass maxDurationMs timeout signal to subscription handlers (#7037)
fix(client): `httpBatchStreamLink` in React Native "stream ends with TypeError" (#6960)
fix(client): fix "stream is not in a state that permits close" in RN (#6957)
fix: prefer Standard Schema for input/output type inference (#6888)
fix(server): fix `MaxListenersExceededWarning` when socket is reused in fastify adapter (#6842)
fix(client): inference fix when serializing of json-like return types like `z.json()` (#6810)
fix(`server/aws-lambda`): Update cookie splitting for lambda adapter (#6569)
fix(server): parallel load calls of lazy router (#6473)
fix(client): ending a stream with the correct error (#6462)
fix(server): transformer at top level for `httpBatchStreamLink` (#6457)
fix(server): encode the SSE messages as bytes instead (#6361)
